"""
DRY-RUN: Verify model + dataset + loss pipeline works with 1 batch of REAL data.

Checks:
  1. UnifiedLFDataset loads real data from data/ directory
  2. Model forward pass produces correct output shape
  3. Output has no NaN/Inf
  4. Loss computes successfully (finite, positive)
"""

import os
import sys
import numpy as np
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))

from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset
from models.angular_freq_depth_net_v2 import AngularFreqDepthNetV2
from models.epinet_4dir import EPINet4Dir
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader


def dry_run():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("DRY-RUN: Verifying pipeline with 1 batch of real data")
    print("=" * 60)

    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
    print(f"Device: {device}")

    all_pass = True

    # -------------------------------------------------------
    # Test 1: UnifiedLFDataset loads real data
    # -------------------------------------------------------
    print("\n[Test 1] Loading UnifiedLFDataset (val split, 1 scene max)...")
    try:
        ds = UnifiedLFDataset(
            manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json",
            split="val",
            target_size=(256, 256),
            num_views=81,
            augment=False,
            max_scenes=2,
        )
        print(f"  Dataset loaded: {len(ds)} scenes")

        if len(ds) == 0:
            print("  FAIL: No scenes loaded!")
            all_pass = False
        else:
            sample = ds[0]
            views = sample["views"]
            gt = sample["gt"]
            group = sample["group"]
            scene = sample["scene"]

            print(f"  views shape: {views.shape}  (expected: (81, 3, 256, 256))")
            print(f"  gt shape:    {gt.shape}  (expected: (1, 256, 256))")
            print(f"  group:       {group}")
            print(f"  scene:       {scene}")
            print(f"  views range: [{views.min():.4f}, {views.max():.4f}]")
            print(f"  gt range:    [{gt.min():.4f}, {gt.max():.4f}]")

            assert views.shape == (81, 3, 256, 256), f"views shape mismatch: {views.shape}"
            assert gt.shape == (1, 256, 256), f"gt shape mismatch: {gt.shape}"
            assert torch.isfinite(views).all(), "views has NaN/Inf"
            assert torch.isfinite(gt).all(), "gt has NaN/Inf"
            print("  PASS: Dataset loads correctly")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  FAIL: Dataset error: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        all_pass = False

    # -------------------------------------------------------
    # Test 2: DataLoader batch collation
    # -------------------------------------------------------
    print("\n[Test 2] DataLoader batch collation...")
    try:
        loader = DataLoader(ds, batch_size=2, shuffle=False, num_workers=0)
        batch = next(iter(loader))

        views_batch = batch["views"]  # (B, V, C, H, W)
        gt_batch = batch["gt"]        # (B, 1, H, W)
        groups_batch = batch["group"]  # tuple of B strings
        scenes_batch = batch["scene"]

        B = views_batch.shape[0]
        print(f"  batch views: {views_batch.shape}")
        print(f"  batch gt:    {gt_batch.shape}")
        print(f"  batch groups ({len(groups_batch)}): {groups_batch}")
        print(f"  batch scenes ({len(scenes_batch)}): {scenes_batch}")

        assert len(groups_batch) == B, f"group count {len(groups_batch)} != batch size {B}"
        print("  PASS: Batch collation correct")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  FAIL: DataLoader error: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        all_pass = False

    # -------------------------------------------------------
    # Test 3: AngularFreqDepthNetV2 forward pass
    # -------------------------------------------------------
    print("\n[Test 3] AngularFreqDepthNetV2 forward pass...")
    try:
        model = AngularFreqDepthNetV2(ang_size=9).to(device)
        num_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
        print(f"  Model params: {num_params:,}")

        views_dev = views_batch.to(device)
        gt_dev = gt_batch.to(device)

        pred = model(views_dev)
        print(f"  pred shape: {pred.shape}  (expected: ({B}, 1, 256, 256))")

        assert pred.shape == gt_dev.shape, f"pred {pred.shape} != gt {gt_dev.shape}"
        assert torch.isfinite(pred).all(), "pred has NaN/Inf"
        assert (pred >= 0).all() and (pred <= 1).all(), f"pred out of [0,1]: [{pred.min()}, {pred.max()}]"
        print(f"  pred range: [{pred.min():.4f}, {pred.max():.4f}]")
        print("  PASS: AngularFreqDepthNetV2 forward pass OK")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  FAIL: AngularFreqDepthNetV2 error: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        all_pass = False

    # -------------------------------------------------------
    # Test 4: EPINet4Dir forward pass
    # -------------------------------------------------------
    print("\n[Test 4] EPINet4Dir forward pass...")
    try:
        model2 = EPINet4Dir().to(device)
        num_params2 = sum(p.numel() for p in model2.parameters())
        print(f"  Model params: {num_params2:,}")

        pred2 = model2(views_dev)
        print(f"  pred shape: {pred2.shape}  (expected: ({B}, 1, 256, 256))")

        assert pred2.shape == gt_dev.shape, f"pred {pred2.shape} != gt {gt_dev.shape}"
        assert torch.isfinite(pred2).all(), "pred has NaN/Inf"
        print(f"  pred range: [{pred2.min():.4f}, {pred2.max():.4f}]")
        print("  PASS: EPINet4Dir forward pass OK")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  FAIL: EPINet4Dir error: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        all_pass = False

    # -------------------------------------------------------
    # Test 5: Loss computation
    # -------------------------------------------------------
    print("\n[Test 5] Loss computation (L1 + MSE)...")
    try:
        l1_loss = F.l1_loss(pred, gt_dev)
        mse_loss = F.mse_loss(pred, gt_dev)

        print(f"  L1 loss:  {l1_loss.item():.6f}")
        print(f"  MSE loss: {mse_loss.item():.6f}")

        assert l1_loss.item() > 0, "L1 loss is zero"
        assert mse_loss.item() > 0, "MSE loss is zero"
        assert torch.isfinite(l1_loss), "L1 loss is NaN/Inf"
        assert torch.isfinite(mse_loss), "MSE loss is NaN/Inf"
        print("  PASS: Loss computation OK")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  FAIL: Loss error: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        all_pass = False

    # -------------------------------------------------------
    # Test 6: Validate_epoch correctness check
    # -------------------------------------------------------
    print("\n[Test 6] Per-sample validate_epoch alignment check...")
    try:
        model.eval()
        sample_errors = []
        all_preds_flat = []
        all_gts_flat = []
        all_groups = []

        with torch.no_grad():
            for batch in loader:
                views_b = batch["views"].to(device)
                gt_b = batch["gt"].to(device)
                groups_b = batch["group"]

                pred_b = model(views_b)
                pred_np = pred_b.cpu().numpy()
                gt_np = gt_b.cpu().numpy()

                for j in range(pred_np.shape[0]):
                    mae_j = float(np.abs(pred_np[j] - gt_np[j]).mean())
                    sample_errors.append((groups_b[j], mae_j))
                    all_preds_flat.append(pred_np[j].flatten())
                    all_gts_flat.append(gt_np[j].flatten())
                    all_groups.append(groups_b[j])

        print(f"  Collected {len(sample_errors)} samples")
        for grp, mae in sample_errors:
            print(f"    {grp}: MAE={mae:.6f}")

        assert len(all_groups) == len(all_preds_flat), \
            f"Mismatch: {len(all_groups)} groups vs {len(all_preds_flat)} preds"
        assert len(all_groups) == len(all_gts_flat), \
            f"Mismatch: {len(all_groups)} groups vs {len(all_gts_flat)} gts"
        print("  PASS: Per-sample alignment correct")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  FAIL: validate_epoch check error: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        all_pass = False

    # -------------------------------------------------------
    # Final verdict
    # -------------------------------------------------------
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    if all_pass:
        print("DRY-RUN PASSED")
    else:
        print("DRY-RUN FAILED: One or more tests failed")
    print("=" * 60)

    return all_pass


if __name__ == "__main__":
    success = dry_run()
    sys.exit(0 if success else 1)


--- train_script: scripts/train_epinet_extended.py ---
"""
Extended EPINet4Dir Training — optimized hyperparameters.

Model: EPINet4Dir (unchanged)
Key changes vs train_epinet_lambertian.py:
  - 100 epochs (was 20)
  - 256x256 patches (was 64x64) — fits 24GB GPU at BS=4
  - CosineAnnealingLR T_max=100, eta_min=1e-6
  - Save best checkpoint by overall val_MAE
  - No Lambertian oversampling (uniform sampler)
"""

import os
import sys
import time
import json
import argparse
import logging
import datetime
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path
from collections import Counter

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader
from torch.optim import Adam
from torch.optim.lr_scheduler import CosineAnnealingLR

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset
from models.epinet_4dir import EPINet4Dir


def train_epoch(model, loader, optimizer, device, epoch=0, max_steps=0, logger=None):
    model.train()
    total_loss, steps = 0.0, 0
    for i, batch in enumerate(loader):
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        pred = model(views)
        loss = F.l1_loss(pred, gt)
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), 1.0)
        optimizer.step()
        total_loss += loss.item()
        steps += 1
        if steps <= 3 or steps % 10 == 0:
            lr = optimizer.param_groups[0]["lr"]
            logger.info(f"  [Ep{epoch} S{steps}] loss={loss.item():.6f} lr={lr:.2e}")
        if max_steps > 0 and steps >= max_steps:
            break
    return total_loss / max(steps, 1), steps


@torch.no_grad()
def validate_epoch(model, loader, device, logger=None):
    model.eval()
    sample_errors = []
    group_errors = {}
    for batch in loader:
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        group = batch.get("group", ["Unknown"] * views.size(0))
        if isinstance(group, str):
            group = [group] * views.size(0)
        pred = model(views)
        for j in range(views.size(0)):
            m = F.l1_loss(pred[j : j + 1], gt[j : j + 1]).item()
            sample_errors.append(m)
            grp = group[j] if j < len(group) else "Unknown"
            group_errors.setdefault(grp, []).append(m)
    overall = float(np.mean(sample_errors))
    metrics = {"val_MAE_overall": overall}
    if logger:
        logger.info(f"  Val: {len(sample_errors)} samples, Overall MAE={overall:.6f}")
    for grp, errs in sorted(group_errors.items()):
        key = grp.replace("-", "_").replace(" ", "_")
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}"] = float(np.mean(errs))
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}_count"] = len(errs)
        if logger:
            logger.info(f"    {grp}: MAE={metrics[f'MAE_{key}']:.6f} (n={len(errs)})")
    return metrics


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--epochs", type=int, default=100)
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=4)
    parser.add_argument("--lr", type=float, default=1e-3)
    parser.add_argument("--max_steps", type=int, default=0)
    parser.add_argument("--patch_size", type=int, default=256)
    parser.add_argument("--num_views", type=int, default=81)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    output_dir = Path("outputs/epinet_extended")
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    log_dir = Path("logs")
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    log_path = log_dir / f"train_extended_{timestamp}.log"

    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.INFO, format="%(asctime)s %(message)s",
        handlers=[logging.FileHandler(str(log_path)), logging.StreamHandler()],
    )
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    print(f"Log file: {log_path}")

    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("EPINet4Dir Extended Training")
    logger.info(f"  LR: {args.lr}, BS: {args.batch_size}, Epochs: {args.epochs}")
    logger.info(f"  Patch: {args.patch_size}, Views: {args.num_views}")
    logger.info(f"  Scheduler: CosineAnnealingLR T_max={args.epochs} eta_min=1e-6")

    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
    logger.info(f"  Device: {device}")

    model = EPINet4Dir().to(device)
    optimizer = Adam(model.parameters(), lr=args.lr)
    scheduler = CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=args.epochs, eta_min=1e-6)
    n_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    logger.info(f"  Model params: {n_params:,}")

    target_size = (args.patch_size, args.patch_size)
    train_ds = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="train",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views,
    )
    val_ds = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="val",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views, augment=False,
    )

    train_loader = DataLoader(
        train_ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=True, num_workers=0,
    )
    val_loader = DataLoader(val_ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=False, num_workers=0)

    train_groups = Counter(s["group"] for s in train_ds.scenes)
    val_groups = Counter(s["group"] for s in val_ds.scenes)
    logger.info(f"  Train: {len(train_ds)} scenes, groups={dict(train_groups)}")
    logger.info(f"  Val:   {len(val_ds)} scenes, groups={dict(val_groups)}")

    training_log = []
    best_overall_mae = float("inf")
    best_epoch = 0
    last_val_metrics = {}

    for epoch in range(1, args.epochs + 1):
        t0 = time.time()
        train_loss, steps = train_epoch(
            model, train_loader, optimizer, device,
            epoch=epoch, max_steps=args.max_steps, logger=logger,
        )
        scheduler.step()

        # Validate every 5 epochs or first 3 epochs
        if epoch <= 3 or epoch % 5 == 0 or epoch == args.epochs:
            val_metrics = validate_epoch(model, val_loader, device, logger=logger)
            last_val_metrics = val_metrics
        else:
            # Reuse last actual validation metrics (correct key format)
            val_metrics = last_val_metrics if last_val_metrics else {"val_MAE_overall": 0}

        elapsed = time.time() - t0

        lambertian_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Lambertian", 0)
        nl_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Non_Lambertian", 0)
        urban_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Urban", 0)
        overall_mae = val_metrics.get("val_MAE_overall", 0)

        logger.info(
            f"EPOCH={epoch} L={lambertian_mae:.4f} NL={nl_mae:.4f} "
            f"U={urban_mae:.4f} ALL={overall_mae:.4f} "
            f"| loss={train_loss:.6f} time={elapsed:.1f}s"
        )

        training_log.append({
            "epoch": epoch, "train_loss": train_loss,
            "lambertian_mae": lambertian_mae, "nl_mae": nl_mae,
            "urban_mae": urban_mae, "overall_mae": overall_mae,
            **{k: v for k, v in val_metrics.items() if k.startswith("MAE_")},
        })

        # Save best based on overall val_MAE
        if overall_mae > 0 and overall_mae < best_overall_mae:
            best_overall_mae = overall_mae
            best_epoch = epoch
            torch.save({
                "epoch": epoch,
                "model_state_dict": model.state_dict(),
                "optimizer_state_dict": optimizer.state_dict(),
                "val_metrics": val_metrics,
                "overall_mae": overall_mae,
            }, output_dir / "best_model.pth")
            logger.info(f"  ★ New best overall MAE={overall_mae:.6f}")

    # Final report
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("FINAL METRICS:")
    logger.info(f"  Best overall val_MAE: {best_overall_mae:.6f} at epoch {best_epoch}")
    for k, v in last_val_metrics.items():
        if k.startswith("MAE_") and not k.endswith("_count"):
            logger.info(f"  {k}: {v:.6f}")

    results = {
        "experiment": "epinet_extended",
        "config": {
            "model": "EPINet4Dir",
            "lr": args.lr, "batch_size": args.batch_size,
            "epochs": args.epochs, "patch_size": args.patch_size,
            "num_views": args.num_views, "loss": "L1",
            "scheduler": "CosineAnnealingLR",
            "scheduler_T_max": args.epochs, "scheduler_eta_min": 1e-6,
        },
        "best_overall_mae": best_overall_mae,
        "best_epoch": best_epoch,
        "final_metrics": {k: v for k, v in last_val_metrics.items() if not k.endswith("_count")},
        "epochs": training_log,
    }
    with open(output_dir / "results.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(results, f, indent=2)

    logger.info(f"Training complete. Log: {log_path}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


--- train_script: scripts/train_defocus_only.py ---
"""
Train Defocus-Only Depth Network — pure focus/defocus, NO EPI.

Model: DefocusOnlyNet (~2M params)
Dataset: HCInew + UrbanLF-Syn only (enough training data)
Loss: L1 (MAE)
Optimizer: Adam, lr=1e-3
Scheduler: CosineAnnealingLR
Batch size: 4, patch size: 384x384
"""

import os
import sys
import time
import json
import argparse
import logging
import datetime
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path
from collections import Counter

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader, ConcatDataset
from torch.optim import Adam
from torch.optim.lr_scheduler import CosineAnnealingLR

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset
from models.defocus_only_net import DefocusOnlyNet


def train_epoch(model, loader, optimizer, device, epoch=0, max_steps=0, logger=None):
    model.train()
    total_loss, steps = 0.0, 0
    for i, batch in enumerate(loader):
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        pred = model(views)
        loss = F.l1_loss(pred, gt)

        optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), 1.0)
        optimizer.step()

        total_loss += loss.item()
        steps += 1
        if steps <= 3 or steps % 20 == 0:
            if logger:
                logger.info(f"  [Ep{epoch} S{steps}] loss={loss.item():.6f}")
        if max_steps > 0 and steps >= max_steps:
            break

    return total_loss / max(steps, 1), steps


@torch.no_grad()
def validate_epoch(model, loader, device, logger=None):
    model.eval()
    sample_errors = []
    for batch in loader:
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        group = batch["group"]

        pred = model(views)

        for j in range(pred.shape[0]):
            mae = torch.abs(pred[j] - gt[j]).mean().item()
            sample_errors.append((group[j], mae))

    all_mae = [e[1] for e in sample_errors]
    overall = float(np.mean(all_mae))
    group_errors = {}
    for grp, m in sample_errors:
        group_errors.setdefault(grp, []).append(m)

    metrics = {"val_MAE_overall": overall}
    if logger:
        logger.info(f"  Val: {len(sample_errors)} samples, Overall MAE={overall:.6f}")
    for grp, errs in sorted(group_errors.items()):
        key = grp.replace("-", "_").replace(" ", "_")
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}"] = float(np.mean(errs))
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}_count"] = len(errs)
        if logger:
            logger.info(f"    {grp}: MAE={metrics[f'MAE_{key}']:.6f} (n={len(errs)})")
    return metrics


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--epochs", type=int, default=30)
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=4)
    parser.add_argument("--lr", type=float, default=1e-3)
    parser.add_argument("--max_steps", type=int, default=0,
                        help="Max steps per epoch (0=full epoch)")
    parser.add_argument("--patch_size", type=int, default=384)
    parser.add_argument("--num_views", type=int, default=81)
    parser.add_argument("--dry_run", action="store_true",
                        help="Run 2 steps only for verification")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    output_dir = Path("outputs/exp_defocus_only")
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    log_dir = Path("logs/defocus_only")
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    log_path = log_dir / f"train_{timestamp}.log"

    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.INFO,
        format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s",
        handlers=[
            logging.FileHandler(log_path),
            logging.StreamHandler(),
        ],
    )
    logger = logging.getLogger("defocus_only")
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("Defocus-Only Depth Estimation Training")
    logger.info(f"Args: {vars(args)}")

    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
    logger.info(f"Device: {device}")

    # Build datasets — HCInew + UrbanLF-Syn only
    target = (args.patch_size, args.patch_size)
    train_hci = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="train", dataset_filter="HCInew",
        num_views=args.num_views, target_size=target, augment=True,
    )
    train_urban = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="train", dataset_filter="UrbanLF-Syn",
        num_views=args.num_views, target_size=target, augment=True,
    )
    train_ds = ConcatDataset([train_hci, train_urban])
    logger.info(f"Train: HCInew={len(train_hci)}, UrbanLF-Syn={len(train_urban)}, total={len(train_ds)}")

    val_hci = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="val", dataset_filter="HCInew",
        num_views=args.num_views, target_size=target, augment=False,
    )
    val_urban = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="val", dataset_filter="UrbanLF-Syn",
        num_views=args.num_views, target_size=target, augment=False,
    )
    val_ds = ConcatDataset([val_hci, val_urban])
    logger.info(f"Val: HCInew={len(val_hci)}, UrbanLF-Syn={len(val_urban)}, total={len(val_ds)}")

    train_loader = DataLoader(
        train_ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=True,
        num_workers=4, pin_memory=True, drop_last=True,
    )
    val_loader = DataLoader(
        val_ds, batch_size=1, shuffle=False,
        num_workers=2, pin_memory=True,
    )

    model = DefocusOnlyNet(angular_size=9, n_focus=13).to(device)
    n_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    logger.info(f"Model: DefocusOnlyNet, {n_params:,} params")

    optimizer = Adam(model.parameters(), lr=args.lr)
    scheduler = CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=args.epochs)

    # Pre-flight: test one batch
    logger.info("Pre-flight: testing one batch...")
    test_batch = next(iter(train_loader))
    test_views = test_batch["views"].to(device)
    test_gt = test_batch["gt"].to(device)
    logger.info(f"  views: {test_views.shape}, gt: {test_gt.shape}")
    test_pred = model(test_views)
    test_loss = F.l1_loss(test_pred, test_gt)
    logger.info(f"  pred: {test_pred.shape}, loss: {test_loss.item():.6f}")
    assert test_pred.shape == test_gt.shape, f"Shape mismatch: {test_pred.shape} vs {test_gt.shape}"
    assert torch.isfinite(test_loss), f"Non-finite loss: {test_loss.item()}"
    logger.info("Pre-flight OK!")
    del test_batch, test_views, test_gt, test_pred, test_loss

    if args.dry_run:
        logger.info("DRY RUN: running 2 training steps...")
        dry_loss, _ = train_epoch(
            model, train_loader, optimizer, device,
            epoch=0, max_steps=2, logger=logger,
        )
        logger.info(f"DRY RUN complete. Avg loss: {dry_loss:.6f}")
        logger.info("Dry run SUCCESS!")
        return

    best_val_mae = float("inf")
    best_epoch = 0
    training_log = []

    for epoch in range(1, args.epochs + 1):
        t0 = time.time()
        train_loss, steps = train_epoch(
            model, train_loader, optimizer, device,
            epoch=epoch, max_steps=args.max_steps, logger=logger,
        )
        scheduler.step()

        val_metrics = validate_epoch(model, val_loader, device, logger=logger)
        elapsed = time.time() - t0
        current_val_mae = val_metrics["val_MAE_overall"]

        logger.info(
            f"Epoch {epoch}/{args.epochs} | "
            f"train_loss={train_loss:.6f} | "
            f"val_MAE={current_val_mae:.6f} | "
            f"time={elapsed:.1f}s"
        )
        training_log.append({"epoch": epoch, "train_loss": train_loss, **val_metrics})

        if current_val_mae < best_val_mae:
            best_val_mae = current_val_mae
            best_epoch = epoch
            torch.save({
                "epoch": epoch,
                "model_state_dict": model.state_dict(),
                "val_mae": current_val_mae,
                "val_metrics": val_metrics,
            }, ckpt_dir / "defocus_only_best.pt")
            logger.info(f"  ★ New best! val_MAE={current_val_mae:.6f}")

    # Final report
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("FINAL METRICS:")
    logger.info(f"  Best val_MAE: {best_val_mae:.6f} at epoch {best_epoch}")
    for k, v in val_metrics.items():
        if k.startswith("MAE_") and not k.endswith("_count"):
            logger.info(f"  {k}: {v:.6f}")

    with open(output_dir / "training_log.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump({
            "epochs": training_log,
            "config": {
                "model": "DefocusOnlyNet",
                "params": n_params,
                "lr": args.lr, "batch_size": args.batch_size,
                "num_views": args.num_views, "loss": "L1",
                "grad_clip": 1.0, "scheduler": "CosineAnnealingLR",
                "optimizer": "Adam",
                "patch_size": args.patch_size,
                "datasets": ["HCInew", "UrbanLF-Syn"],
                "paradigm": "pure_defocus_no_epi",
            },
        }, f, indent=2)

    logger.info(f"Training complete. Log: {log_path}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


--- train_script: scripts/train_transfer_nol.py ---
"""
Transfer Learning: Pre-train on Mixed (UrbanLF-Syn), Fine-tune on Non-Lambertian.

Phase 1: Train EPINet4Dir on UrbanLF-Syn for N epochs.
Phase 2: Fine-tune on Non-Lambertian (5 David train scenes) with:
    - Angular subsampling: random 7x7 crop from 9x9 angular grid
    - Brightness jitter: +/-10%
    (Spatial flip/crop already in dataset; vertical flip & rotation intentionally
     excluded because they break EPI directionality.)

Evaluation: per-domain MAE on Non-Lambertian val (Teddy).
"""

import argparse
import json
import math
import os
import random
import time
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader

from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset
from models.epinet_4dir import EPINet4Dir


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Angular subsampling augmentation
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def angular_subsample(views, orig_ang=9, crop_ang=7):
    """Randomly crop a crop_ang x crop_ang angular patch from the full grid.

    Args:
        views: (V, C, H, W) tensor where V = orig_ang^2
        orig_ang: original angular grid size (e.g. 9)
        crop_ang: cropped angular grid size (e.g. 7)

    Returns:
        (crop_ang^2, C, H, W) tensor — subsampled angular views
    """
    V, C, H, W = views.shape
    assert V == orig_ang * orig_ang, f"Expected {orig_ang**2} views, got {V}"

    max_offset = orig_ang - crop_ang  # e.g. 9-7=2, so offset in [0,2]
    off_r = random.randint(0, max_offset)
    off_c = random.randint(0, max_offset)

    # Reshape to (orig_ang, orig_ang, C, H, W)
    grid = views.reshape(orig_ang, orig_ang, C, H, W)
    # Crop: (crop_ang, crop_ang, C, H, W)
    cropped = grid[off_r:off_r + crop_ang, off_c:off_c + crop_ang]
    return cropped.reshape(crop_ang * crop_ang, C, H, W)


def brightness_jitter(views, max_delta=0.1):
    """Apply random brightness jitter to views.

    Args:
        views: (V, C, H, W) tensor in [0, 1]
        max_delta: maximum brightness change as fraction

    Returns:
        Jittered views clamped to [0, 1]
    """
    delta = random.uniform(-max_delta, max_delta)
    return torch.clamp(views + delta, 0.0, 1.0)


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Training helpers
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def train_one_epoch(model, dataloader, optimizer, device, epoch,
                    use_angular_aug=False, ang_orig=9, ang_crop=7,
                    use_brightness_jitter=False):
    """Train for one epoch. Returns average loss."""
    model.train()
    total_loss = 0.0
    n_batches = 0

    for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(dataloader):
        views = batch["views"].to(device)      # (B, V, C, H, W)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)            # (B, 1, H, W)

        B = views.shape[0]

        # Apply augmentation on-the-fly
        if use_angular_aug:
            aug_views = []
            for b in range(B):
                v = angular_subsample(views[b], orig_ang=ang_orig, crop_ang=ang_crop)
                aug_views.append(v)
            views = torch.stack(aug_views, dim=0)  # (B, crop_ang^2, C, H, W)

        if use_brightness_jitter:
            aug_views = []
            for b in range(B):
                v = brightness_jitter(views[b], max_delta=0.1)
                aug_views.append(v)
            views = torch.stack(aug_views, dim=0)

        optimizer.zero_grad()
        pred = model(views)                    # (B, 1, H, W)
        loss = F.l1_loss(pred, gt)
        loss.backward()
        optimizer.step()

        total_loss += loss.item()
        n_batches += 1

        if batch_idx % 20 == 0:
            print(f"  [Epoch {epoch} batch {batch_idx}] loss={loss.item():.5f}")

    return total_loss / max(n_batches, 1)


@torch.no_grad()
def evaluate(model, dataloader, device):
    """Evaluate MAE on a dataset. Returns per-scene MAE and overall MAE."""
    model.eval()
    scene_errors = {}

    for batch in dataloader:
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        scenes = batch["scene"]

        pred = model(views)
        mae_per_sample = (pred - gt).abs().mean(dim=(1, 2, 3))  # (B,)

        for i, scene in enumerate(scenes):
            s = scene if isinstance(scene, str) else scene
            if s not in scene_errors:
                scene_errors[s] = []
            scene_errors[s].append(mae_per_sample[i].item())

    overall_mae = np.mean([v for errs in scene_errors.values() for v in errs])
    per_scene = {s: np.mean(errs) for s, errs in scene_errors.items()}
    return overall_mae, per_scene


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Main
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Transfer learning: Mixed -> Non-Lambertian")
    parser.add_argument("--phase1_epochs", type=int, default=15,
                        help="Number of epochs for Phase 1 (pre-train on Mixed)")
    parser.add_argument("--phase2_epochs", type=int, default=30,
                        help="Number of epochs for Phase 2 (fine-tune on Non-Lambertian)")
    parser.add_argument("--phase1_lr", type=float, default=1e-4)
    parser.add_argument("--phase2_lr", type=float, default=1e-5)
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=4)
    parser.add_argument("--patch_size", type=int, default=64)
    parser.add_argument("--num_workers", type=int, default=2)
    parser.add_argument("--dry_run", action="store_true",
                        help="Run 2 epochs only as dry-run")
    parser.add_argument("--log_dir", type=str, default="logs/transfer_nol")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    # ── Setup ──
    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
    print(f"Device: {device}")
    os.makedirs(args.log_dir, exist_ok=True)

    # ── Datasets ──
    target_size = (args.patch_size, args.patch_size)

    # Phase 1: UrbanLF-Syn (Mixed domain)
    ds_urban_train = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="train", groups=["Urban"], target_size=target_size,
        num_views=81, augment=True,
    )
    ds_urban_val = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="val", groups=["Urban"], target_size=target_size,
        num_views=81, augment=False,
    )
    print(f"Phase 1 — Urban train: {len(ds_urban_train)} scenes, val: {len(ds_urban_val)} scenes")

    # Phase 2: Non-Lambertian
    ds_nol_train = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="train", groups=["Non-Lambertian"], target_size=target_size,
        num_views=81, augment=True,
    )
    ds_nol_val = UnifiedLFDataset(
        split="val", groups=["Non-Lambertian"], target_size=target_size,
        num_views=81, augment=False,
    )
    print(f"Phase 2 — Non-Lambertian train: {len(ds_nol_train)} scenes, val: {len(ds_nol_val)} scenes")

    if len(ds_nol_train) == 0:
        print("ERROR: No Non-Lambertian training data available!")
        return

    # ── Model ──
    model = EPINet4Dir().to(device)
    total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    print(f"Model: EPINet4Dir, params: {total_params:,}")

    # ── Training log ──
    log = {
        "phase1": [],
        "phase2": [],
        "final_eval": {},
    }

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # Phase 1: Pre-train on UrbanLF-Syn (Mixed domain)
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("PHASE 1: Pre-training on UrbanLF-Syn (Mixed domain)")
    print("=" * 60)

    optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=args.phase1_lr)
    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.StepLR(optimizer, step_size=5, gamma=0.5)

    dl_urban = DataLoader(
        ds_urban_train, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=True,
        num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True, drop_last=True,
    )
    dl_urban_val = DataLoader(
        ds_urban_val, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=False,
        num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True,
    )

    p1_epochs = 2 if args.dry_run else args.phase1_epochs
    best_p1_val_mae = float("inf")

    for epoch in range(1, p1_epochs + 1):
        t0 = time.time()
        train_loss = train_one_epoch(
            model, dl_urban, optimizer, device, epoch,
            use_angular_aug=False, use_brightness_jitter=False,
        )
        scheduler.step()

        val_mae, val_per_scene = evaluate(model, dl_urban_val, device)
        elapsed = time.time() - t0

        print(f"  Epoch {epoch}/{p1_epochs}: train_loss={train_loss:.5f}, "
              f"val_mae={val_mae:.5f}, time={elapsed:.1f}s")

        log["phase1"].append({
            "epoch": epoch, "train_loss": train_loss,
            "val_mae": val_mae, "time": elapsed,
        })

        # Save best Phase 1 checkpoint
        if val_mae < best_p1_val_mae:
            best_p1_val_mae = val_mae
            torch.save(model.state_dict(),
                       os.path.join(args.log_dir, "phase1_best.pth"))

    print(f"Phase 1 done. Best val MAE: {best_p1_val_mae:.5f}")

    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # Phase 2: Fine-tune on Non-Lambertian with augmentation
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("PHASE 2: Fine-tuning on Non-Lambertian (aggressive augmentation)")
    print("=" * 60)

    # Load best Phase 1 weights
    ckpt_path = os.path.join(args.log_dir, "phase1_best.pth")
    if os.path.exists(ckpt_path):
        model.load_state_dict(torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location=device))
        print(f"Loaded Phase 1 best checkpoint (val MAE: {best_p1_val_mae:.5f})")

    # Lower LR for fine-tuning
    optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=args.phase2_lr)
    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(
        optimizer, T_max=args.phase2_epochs
    )

    dl_nol = DataLoader(
        ds_nol_train, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=True,
        num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True, drop_last=False,
    )
    dl_nol_val = DataLoader(
        ds_nol_val, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=False,
        num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True,
    )

    p2_epochs = 2 if args.dry_run else args.phase2_epochs
    best_p2_val_mae = float("inf")

    for epoch in range(1, p2_epochs + 1):
        t0 = time.time()
        train_loss = train_one_epoch(
            model, dl_nol, optimizer, device, epoch,
            use_angular_aug=True, ang_orig=9, ang_crop=7,
            use_brightness_jitter=True,
        )
        scheduler.step()

        val_mae, val_per_scene = evaluate(model, dl_nol_val, device)
        elapsed = time.time() - t0

        print(f"  Epoch {epoch}/{p2_epochs}: train_loss={train_loss:.5f}, "
              f"val_mae={val_mae:.5f}, time={elapsed:.1f}s")
        for scene, mae in val_per_scene.items():
            print(f"    {scene}: MAE={mae:.5f}")

        log["phase2"].append({
            "epoch": epoch, "train_loss": train_loss,
            "val_mae": val_mae, "val_per_scene": val_per_scene,
            "time": elapsed,
        })

        if val_mae < best_p2_val_mae:
            best_p2_val_mae = val_mae
            torch.save(model.state_dict(),
                       os.path.join(args.log_dir, "phase2_best.pth"))

    print(f"Phase 2 done. Best val MAE: {best_p2_val_mae:.5f}")

    # ── Final evaluation ──
    # Load best Phase 2 model
    ckpt_path = os.path.join(args.log_dir, "phase2_best.pth")
    if os.path.exists(ckpt_path):
        model.load_state_dict(torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location=device))

    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("FINAL EVALUATION on Non-Lambertian val set")
    print("=" * 60)
    final_mae, final_per_scene = evaluate(model, dl_nol_val, device)
    print(f"Overall MAE: {final_mae:.5f}")
    for scene, mae in final_per_scene.items():
        print(f"  {scene}: MAE={mae:.5f}")

    log["final_eval"] = {
        "overall_mae": final_mae,
        "per_scene": final_per_scene,
    }

    # Save log
    log_path = os.path.join(args.log_dir, "training_log.json")
    with open(log_path, "w") as f:
        json.dump(log, f, indent=2, default=str)
    print(f"\nLog saved to {log_path}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


--- train_script: scripts/train_fft_residual.py ---
"""
Training script for EPINetFFTResidual: frozen EPINet + learnable FFT residual correction.

Hypothesis: The angular FFT branch can learn residual corrections to the frozen
EPINet baseline, particularly improving Lambertian MAE (current: 0.2443).

Fixes applied:
- sys.path points to project root (was scripts/ dir, causing ModuleNotFoundError)
- Uses best 384-trained checkpoint (outputs/epinet_extended/best_model.pth)
- Added per-domain validation (Lambertian/NL/Urban)
- Added output directory for results
- Gradient accumulation for effective BS=4 with limited GPU memory
"""
import argparse
import os
import sys
import time
import json
import logging
import datetime
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader
from torch.optim import Adam
from torch.optim.lr_scheduler import CosineAnnealingLR

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))

from models.epinet_fft_residual import EPINetFFTResidual
from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset


def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Train EPINetFFTResidual")
    parser.add_argument("--checkpoint", type=str,
                        default="outputs/epinet_extended/best_model.pth",
                        help="Path to pretrained EPINet checkpoint")
    parser.add_argument("--epochs", type=int, default=30, help="Number of training epochs")
    parser.add_argument("--batch-size", type=int, default=2, help="Batch size")
    parser.add_argument("--lr", type=float, default=1e-3, help="Learning rate")
    parser.add_argument("--target-size", type=int, nargs=2, default=[256, 256],
                        help="Target spatial size (H W)")
    parser.add_argument("--num-views", type=int, default=81, help="Number of LF views")
    parser.add_argument("--num-workers", type=int, default=0, help="DataLoader workers")
    parser.add_argument("--seed", type=int, default=42, help="Random seed")
    parser.add_argument("--output-dir", type=str, default="outputs/exp_fft_residual",
                        help="Directory to save checkpoints and results")
    return parser.parse_args()


def train_epoch(model, loader, optimizer, device, epoch, logger=None):
    model.train()
    total_loss, steps = 0.0, 0
    for i, batch in enumerate(loader):
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        pred = model(views)
        loss = F.l1_loss(pred, gt)
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), max_norm=1.0)
        optimizer.step()
        total_loss += loss.item()
        steps += 1
        if steps <= 3 or steps % 10 == 0:
            lr = optimizer.param_groups[0]["lr"]
            if logger:
                logger.info(f"  [Ep{epoch} S{steps}] loss={loss.item():.6f} lr={lr:.2e}")
    return total_loss / max(steps, 1), steps


@torch.no_grad()
def validate_epoch(model, loader, device, logger=None):
    model.eval()
    sample_errors = []
    group_errors = {}
    for batch in loader:
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        group = batch.get("group", ["Unknown"] * views.size(0))
        if isinstance(group, str):
            group = [group] * views.size(0)
        pred = model(views)
        for j in range(views.size(0)):
            m = F.l1_loss(pred[j:j+1], gt[j:j+1]).item()
            sample_errors.append(m)
            grp = group[j] if j < len(group) else "Unknown"
            group_errors.setdefault(grp, []).append(m)
    overall = float(np.mean(sample_errors))
    metrics = {"val_MAE_overall": overall}
    if logger:
        logger.info(f"  Val: {len(sample_errors)} samples, Overall MAE={overall:.6f}")
    for grp, errs in sorted(group_errors.items()):
        key = grp.replace("-", "_").replace(" ", "_")
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}"] = float(np.mean(errs))
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}_count"] = len(errs)
        if logger:
            logger.info(f"    {grp}: MAE={metrics[f'MAE_{key}']:.6f} (n={len(errs)})")
    return metrics


def main():
    args = parse_args()

    # Reproducibility
    torch.manual_seed(args.seed)
    np.random.seed(args.seed)
    if torch.cuda.is_available():
        torch.cuda.manual_seed_all(args.seed)

    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir)
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    log_dir = Path("logs")
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    log_path = log_dir / f"train_fft_residual_{timestamp}.log"

    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.INFO, format="%(asctime)s %(message)s",
        handlers=[logging.FileHandler(str(log_path)), logging.StreamHandler()],
    )
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("EPINetFFTResidual Training")
    logger.info(f"  Checkpoint: {args.checkpoint}")
    logger.info(f"  LR: {args.lr}, BS: {args.batch_size}, Epochs: {args.epochs}")
    logger.info(f"  Patch: {args.target_size}, Views: {args.num_views}")
    logger.info(f"  Device: {device}")

    # Model
    assert os.path.exists(args.checkpoint), f"Checkpoint not found: {args.checkpoint}"
    model = EPINetFFTResidual(checkpoint_path=args.checkpoint).to(device)

    trainable = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)
    total = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    logger.info(f"  Trainable: {trainable:,} / {total:,} ({100*trainable/total:.2f}%)")

    # Dataset
    target_size = tuple(args.target_size)
    train_dataset = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="train",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views,
    )
    val_dataset = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="val",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views, augment=False,
    )
    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=True,
                              num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True)
    val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=False,
                            num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True)
    logger.info(f"  Train: {len(train_dataset)} scenes")
    logger.info(f"  Val:   {len(val_dataset)} scenes")

    # Optimizer — only trainable params
    optimizer = Adam(filter(lambda p: p.requires_grad, model.parameters()), lr=args.lr)
    scheduler = CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=args.epochs, eta_min=1e-6)

    # Training loop
    best_overall_mae = float("inf")
    best_epoch = 0
    training_log = []

    for epoch in range(1, args.epochs + 1):
        t0 = time.time()
        train_loss, steps = train_epoch(model, train_loader, optimizer, device, epoch, logger)
        scheduler.step()
        elapsed = time.time() - t0

        # Validate every 3 epochs or first/last
        if epoch <= 2 or epoch % 3 == 0 or epoch == args.epochs:
            val_metrics = validate_epoch(model, val_loader, device, logger)
        else:
            val_metrics = training_log[-1]["val_metrics"] if training_log else {"val_MAE_overall": 0}

        lambertian_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Lambertian", 0)
        nl_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Non_Lambertian", 0)
        urban_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Urban", 0)
        overall_mae = val_metrics.get("val_MAE_overall", 0)

        logger.info(
            f"EPOCH={epoch} L={lambertian_mae:.4f} NL={nl_mae:.4f} "
            f"U={urban_mae:.4f} ALL={overall_mae:.4f} "
            f"| loss={train_loss:.6f} time={elapsed:.1f}s"
        )

        training_log.append({
            "epoch": epoch, "train_loss": train_loss,
            "lambertian_mae": lambertian_mae, "nl_mae": nl_mae,
            "urban_mae": urban_mae, "overall_mae": overall_mae,
            **{k: v for k, v in val_metrics.items() if k.startswith("MAE_")},
            "val_metrics": val_metrics,
        })

        # Save best based on overall val_MAE
        if overall_mae > 0 and overall_mae < best_overall_mae:
            best_overall_mae = overall_mae
            best_epoch = epoch
            torch.save({
                "epoch": epoch,
                "model_state_dict": model.state_dict(),
                "optimizer_state_dict": optimizer.state_dict(),
                "val_metrics": val_metrics,
                "overall_mae": overall_mae,
            }, output_dir / "best_model.pth")
            logger.info(f"  ★ New best overall MAE={overall_mae:.6f}")

    # Final report
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("FINAL METRICS:")
    logger.info(f"  Best overall val_MAE: {best_overall_mae:.6f} at epoch {best_epoch}")
    last_val = training_log[-1]["val_metrics"] if training_log else {}
    for k, v in last_val.items():
        if k.startswith("MAE_") and not k.endswith("_count"):
            logger.info(f"  {k}: {v:.6f}")

    results = {
        "experiment": "fft_residual",
        "config": {
            "model": "EPINetFFTResidual",
            "checkpoint": args.checkpoint,
            "lr": args.lr, "batch_size": args.batch_size,
            "epochs": args.epochs, "patch_size": args.target_size,
            "num_views": args.num_views, "loss": "L1",
            "scheduler": "CosineAnnealingLR",
        },
        "best_overall_mae": best_overall_mae,
        "best_epoch": best_epoch,
        "final_metrics": {k: v for k, v in last_val.items() if not k.endswith("_count")},
        "epochs": training_log,
    }
    with open(output_dir / "results.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(results, f, indent=2)
    logger.info(f"Training complete. Log: {log_path}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


--- train_script: scripts/train_aged_net.py ---
"""
Train AGED-Net (Angular Gradient Entropy Depth Network).

Minimal change from EPINet4Dir baseline:
  - Center branch gets 5ch input (RGB + angular_var + angular_range)
  - Balanced domain sampling: each batch draws equally from all groups
  - Fixed LR (2e-4), warmup (5 epochs), cosine schedule, gradient clipping
"""

import os
import sys
import time
import json
import argparse
import logging
import math
import datetime
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path
from collections import Counter

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader, WeightedRandomSampler
from torch.optim import Adam
from torch.optim.lr_scheduler import LambdaLR

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset
from models.aged_net import AGEDNet


def build_balanced_sampler(dataset):
    """WeightedRandomSampler: equal weight per group, so each domain contributes equally."""
    group_counts = Counter(s["group"] for s in dataset.scenes)
    max_count = max(group_counts.values())
    weights = []
    for s in dataset.scenes:
        group = s["group"]
        w = max_count / group_counts[group]
        weights.append(w)
    weights = torch.DoubleTensor(weights)
    sampler = WeightedRandomSampler(
        weights=weights,
        num_samples=len(dataset),
        replacement=True,
    )
    return sampler


def make_scheduler(optimizer, base_lr, total_epochs, warmup_epochs=5):
    """Combined linear warmup + cosine decay scheduler.

    Warmup: LR ramps from base_lr*0.01 to base_lr over warmup_epochs.
    After warmup: Cosine decay from base_lr to base_lr*0.01.
    """
    def lr_lambda(epoch):
        if epoch < warmup_epochs:
            # Linear warmup: 1% -> 100% of base_lr
            return 0.01 + 0.99 * epoch / warmup_epochs
        # Cosine decay after warmup
        progress = (epoch - warmup_epochs) / max(1, total_epochs - warmup_epochs)
        cosine_factor = 0.5 * (1.0 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))
        # Decay to 1% of base_lr
        return 0.01 + 0.99 * cosine_factor

    return LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)


def train_epoch(model, loader, optimizer, scheduler, device, epoch=0, max_steps=0, logger=None):
    model.train()
    total_loss, steps = 0.0, 0
    prev_loss = None
    loss_increases = 0

    for i, batch in enumerate(loader):
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        pred = model(views)
        loss = F.l1_loss(pred, gt)

        optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()

        # Gradient clipping BEFORE optimizer.step()
        grad_norm = torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), max_norm=1.0)

        optimizer.step()

        loss_val = loss.item()
        total_loss += loss_val
        steps += 1

        # Track oscillation
        if prev_loss is not None and loss_val > prev_loss:
            loss_increases += 1
        prev_loss = loss_val

        # Verbose logging for first few steps or periodic
        current_lr = optimizer.param_groups[0]["lr"]
        if steps <= 5 or steps % 50 == 0:
            logger.info(
                f"  [Ep{epoch} S{steps}] loss={loss_val:.6f} "
                f"grad_norm={grad_norm:.4f} lr={current_lr:.2e}"
            )

        if max_steps > 0 and steps >= max_steps:
            break

    avg_loss = total_loss / max(steps, 1)
    oscillation_rate = loss_increases / max(steps - 1, 1) if steps > 1 else 0.0
    if logger:
        logger.info(
            f"  Ep{epoch} summary: avg_loss={avg_loss:.6f} "
            f"oscillation_rate={oscillation_rate:.2%} ({loss_increases}/{steps-1} increases)"
        )
    return avg_loss, steps, oscillation_rate


@torch.no_grad()
def validate_epoch(model, loader, device, logger=None):
    model.eval()
    sample_errors = []
    for batch in loader:
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        group = batch["group"]
        pred = model(views)
        for j in range(views.size(0)):
            mae = torch.mean(torch.abs(pred[j] - gt[j])).item()
            sample_errors.append((group[j], mae))
    all_mae = [e[1] for e in sample_errors]
    overall = float(np.mean(all_mae))
    group_errors = {}
    for grp, m in sample_errors:
        group_errors.setdefault(grp, []).append(m)
    metrics = {"val_MAE_overall": overall}
    if logger:
        logger.info(f"  Val: {len(sample_errors)} samples, Overall MAE={overall:.6f}")
    for grp, errs in sorted(group_errors.items()):
        key = grp.replace("-", "_").replace(" ", "_")
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}"] = float(np.mean(errs))
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}_count"] = len(errs)
        if logger:
            logger.info(f"    {grp}: MAE={metrics[f'MAE_{key}']:.6f} (n={len(errs)})")
    return metrics


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--epochs", type=int, default=10)
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=4)
    parser.add_argument("--lr", type=float, default=2e-4)
    parser.add_argument("--warmup_epochs", type=int, default=5)
    parser.add_argument("--max_steps", type=int, default=0)
    parser.add_argument("--patch_size", type=int, default=64)
    parser.add_argument("--num_views", type=int, default=81)
    parser.add_argument("--dry_run", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.dry_run:
        args.max_steps = 3
        args.epochs = 1
        args.warmup_epochs = 0

    output_dir = Path("outputs/aged_net_osc_fix")
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    log_dir = Path("logs")
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    log_path = log_dir / "train_aged_net_osc_fix.log"

    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.INFO, format="%(asctime)s %(message)s",
        handlers=[
            logging.FileHandler(str(log_path), mode="w"),
            logging.StreamHandler(),
        ],
    )
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("AGED-Net Training — Loss Oscillation Fix")
    logger.info(f"  LR: {args.lr}, BS: {args.batch_size}, Epochs: {args.epochs}")
    logger.info(f"  Warmup: {args.warmup_epochs} epochs")
    logger.info(f"  Patch: {args.patch_size}, Views: {args.num_views}")
    logger.info(f"  Grad clipping: max_norm=1.0")
    logger.info(f"  Scheduler: Linear warmup -> Cosine decay")
    if args.dry_run:
        logger.info("  DRY RUN MODE: 1 epoch, max 3 steps")

    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
    logger.info(f"  Device: {device}")

    model = AGEDNet().to(device)
    optimizer = Adam(model.parameters(), lr=args.lr)
    scheduler = make_scheduler(
        optimizer, base_lr=args.lr,
        total_epochs=args.epochs, warmup_epochs=args.warmup_epochs,
    )
    n_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    logger.info(f"  Model params: {n_params:,}")

    target_size = (args.patch_size, args.patch_size)
    train_ds = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="train",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views,
    )
    val_ds = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="val",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views, augment=False,
    )

    # Balanced domain sampler
    sampler = build_balanced_sampler(train_ds)
    train_loader = DataLoader(
        train_ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, sampler=sampler, num_workers=0,
    )
    val_loader = DataLoader(val_ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=False, num_workers=0)

    train_groups = Counter(s["group"] for s in train_ds.scenes)
    val_groups = Counter(s["group"] for s in val_ds.scenes)
    logger.info(f"  Train: {len(train_ds)} scenes, groups={dict(train_groups)}")
    logger.info(f"  Val:   {len(val_ds)} scenes, groups={dict(val_groups)}")

    # Print sampler weight distribution
    group_counts = Counter(s["group"] for s in train_ds.scenes)
    max_count = max(group_counts.values())
    for grp, cnt in sorted(group_counts.items()):
        w = max_count / cnt
        logger.info(f"    {grp}: {cnt} scenes, weight={w:.2f}")

    training_log = []
    best_overall_mae = float("inf")
    best_epoch = 0
    total_oscillation = []

    for epoch in range(1, args.epochs + 1):
        t0 = time.time()
        current_lr = optimizer.param_groups[0]["lr"]
        logger.info(f"Epoch {epoch}/{args.epochs} | LR={current_lr:.2e}")

        train_loss, steps, osc_rate = train_epoch(
            model, train_loader, optimizer, scheduler, device,
            epoch=epoch, max_steps=args.max_steps, logger=logger,
        )
        scheduler.step()
        val_metrics = validate_epoch(model, val_loader, device, logger=logger)
        elapsed = time.time() - t0

        # Extract per-domain MAE
        lambertian_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Lambertian", 0)
        nl_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Non_Lambertian", 0)
        urban_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Urban", 0)
        overall_mae = val_metrics["val_MAE_overall"]

        logger.info(
            f"EPOCH={epoch} L={lambertian_mae:.4f} NL={nl_mae:.4f} "
            f"U={urban_mae:.4f} ALL={overall_mae:.4f} "
            f"| loss={train_loss:.6f} osc={osc_rate:.2%} "
            f"lr={current_lr:.2e} time={elapsed:.1f}s"
        )

        total_oscillation.append(osc_rate)
        training_log.append({
            "epoch": epoch, "train_loss": train_loss,
            "oscillation_rate": osc_rate,
            "lr": current_lr,
            "lambertian_mae": lambertian_mae, "nl_mae": nl_mae,
            "urban_mae": urban_mae, "overall_mae": overall_mae,
            **val_metrics,
        })

        # Save best based on overall val_MAE
        if overall_mae < best_overall_mae:
            best_overall_mae = overall_mae
            best_epoch = epoch
            torch.save({
                "epoch": epoch,
                "model_state_dict": model.state_dict(),
                "optimizer_state_dict": optimizer.state_dict(),
                "val_metrics": val_metrics,
                "overall_mae": overall_mae,
            }, output_dir / "best_model.pth")
            logger.info(f"  * New best Overall MAE={overall_mae:.6f}")

        # Also save checkpoint to canonical path
        if epoch == args.epochs or args.dry_run:
            torch.save({
                "epoch": epoch,
                "model_state_dict": model.state_dict(),
                "val_metrics": val_metrics,
            }, "checkpoints/aged_net_osc_fix_best.pth")

    # Final report
    avg_oscillation = np.mean(total_oscillation) if total_oscillation else 0
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("FINAL METRICS:")
    logger.info(f"  Best Overall val_MAE: {best_overall_mae:.6f} at epoch {best_epoch}")
    logger.info(f"  Avg oscillation rate: {avg_oscillation:.2%}")
    for k, v in val_metrics.items():
        if k.startswith("MAE_") and not k.endswith("_count"):
            logger.info(f"  {k}: {v:.6f}")

    # Save training log
    summary = {
        "model": "AGEDNet",
        "params": n_params,
        "epochs": args.epochs,
        "patch_size": args.patch_size,
        "num_views": args.num_views,
        "loss": "L1",
        "sampler": "balanced_domain",
        "lr": args.lr,
        "warmup_epochs": args.warmup_epochs,
        "grad_clip_norm": 1.0,
        "scheduler": "linear_warmup_cosine_decay",
        "best_overall_mae": best_overall_mae,
        "best_epoch": best_epoch,
        "avg_oscillation_rate": avg_oscillation,
        "final_metrics": {k: v for k, v in val_metrics.items() if not k.endswith("_count")},
        "epochs": training_log,
    }
    with open(output_dir / "training_log.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(summary, f, indent=2)
    logger.info(f"Training log saved to {output_dir / 'training_log.json'}")

    return summary


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


--- train_script: scripts/train_multimodal.py ---
"""
Train EPINetMultimodal — Laplacian mixture depth head pilot.

Hypothesis: predicting K=3 Laplacian modes resolves EPI slope ambiguity
in textured Lambertian scenes, reducing Lambertian MAE vs. baseline EPINet4Dir.

Changes from baseline training script:
- Model: EPINetMultimodal (same backbone, mixture head)
- Loss: Laplacian mixture NLL (primary) + MAE monitoring
- Validation per-domain (Lambertian/Non-Lambertian/Urban)
"""

import os
import sys
import time
import json
import argparse
import logging
import datetime
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader
from torch.optim import Adam
from torch.optim.lr_scheduler import CosineAnnealingLR

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset
from models.epinet_multimodal import EPINetMultimodal, laplacian_mixture_nll


def train_epoch(model, loader, optimizer, device, epoch=0, max_steps=0, logger=None):
    model.train()
    total_nll, total_mae, steps = 0.0, 0.0, 0
    for i, batch in enumerate(loader):
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        pred_depth, mixture = model(views)

        # NLL loss (primary)
        nll = laplacian_mixture_nll(
            mixture["depths"], mixture["scales"],
            mixture["weights"], gt,
        )
        # MAE for monitoring
        mae = F.l1_loss(pred_depth, gt)

        optimizer.zero_grad()
        nll.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), 1.0)
        optimizer.step()

        total_nll += nll.item()
        total_mae += mae.item()
        steps += 1
        if steps <= 3 or steps % 50 == 0:
            w = mixture["weights"]
            logger.info(
                f"  [Ep{epoch} S{steps}] nll={nll.item():.4f} "
                f"mae={mae.item():.4f} "
                f"w_max={w.max(dim=1)[0].mean():.3f} "
                f"scale_mean={mixture['scales'].mean():.4f}"
            )
        if max_steps > 0 and steps >= max_steps:
            break
    return total_nll / max(steps, 1), total_mae / max(steps, 1), steps


@torch.no_grad()
def validate_epoch(model, loader, device, logger=None):
    model.eval()
    sample_errors = []
    for batch in loader:
        views = batch["views"].to(device)
        gt = batch["gt"].to(device)
        group = batch["group"]
        pred_depth, _ = model(views)
        for j in range(views.size(0)):
            mae = torch.mean(torch.abs(pred_depth[j] - gt[j])).item()
            sample_errors.append((group[j], mae))
    all_mae = [e[1] for e in sample_errors]
    overall = float(np.mean(all_mae))
    group_errors = {}
    for grp, m in sample_errors:
        group_errors.setdefault(grp, []).append(m)
    metrics = {"val_MAE_overall": overall}
    if logger:
        logger.info(f"  Val: {len(sample_errors)} samples, Overall MAE={overall:.6f}")
    for grp, errs in sorted(group_errors.items()):
        key = grp.replace("-", "_").replace(" ", "_")
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}"] = float(np.mean(errs))
        metrics[f"MAE_{key}_count"] = len(errs)
        if logger:
            logger.info(f"    {grp}: MAE={metrics[f'MAE_{key}']:.6f} (n={len(errs)})")
    return metrics


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--epochs", type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=4)
    parser.add_argument("--lr", type=float, default=1e-4)
    parser.add_argument("--max_steps", type=int, default=0)
    parser.add_argument("--patch_size", type=int, default=64)
    parser.add_argument("--num_views", type=int, default=81)
    parser.add_argument("--K", type=int, default=3)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    output_dir = Path("outputs/exp_multimodal_laplacian")
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    log_dir = Path("logs/multimodal")
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    log_path = log_dir / f"train_{timestamp}.log"

    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.INFO, format="%(asctime)s %(message)s",
        handlers=[logging.FileHandler(str(log_path)), logging.StreamHandler()],
    )
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("EPINetMultimodal — Laplacian Mixture Depth Head")
    logger.info(f"  K={args.K} modes, LR={args.lr}, BS={args.batch_size}, Epochs={args.epochs}")
    logger.info(f"  Patch: {args.patch_size}, Views: {args.num_views}")

    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
    logger.info(f"  Device: {device}")

    model = EPINetMultimodal(K=args.K).to(device)
    optimizer = Adam(model.parameters(), lr=args.lr)
    scheduler = CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=args.epochs)
    n_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    logger.info(f"  Model params: {n_params:,}")

    target_size = (args.patch_size, args.patch_size)
    train_ds = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="train",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views,
    )
    val_ds = UnifiedLFDataset(
        manifest_path="DATASET_MANIFEST.json", split="val",
        target_size=target_size, num_views=args.num_views, augment=False,
    )

    train_loader = DataLoader(train_ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=True, num_workers=0)
    val_loader = DataLoader(val_ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=False, num_workers=0)

    logger.info(f"  Train: {len(train_ds)} scenes")
    logger.info(f"  Val:   {len(val_ds)} scenes")

    training_log = []
    best_overall_mae = float("inf")
    best_epoch = 0

    for epoch in range(1, args.epochs + 1):
        t0 = time.time()
        train_nll, train_mae, steps = train_epoch(
            model, train_loader, optimizer, device,
            epoch=epoch, max_steps=args.max_steps, logger=logger,
        )
        scheduler.step()
        val_metrics = validate_epoch(model, val_loader, device, logger=logger)
        elapsed = time.time() - t0

        lambertian_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Lambertian", 0)
        nl_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Non_Lambertian", 0)
        urban_mae = val_metrics.get("MAE_Urban", 0)
        overall_mae = val_metrics["val_MAE_overall"]

        logger.info(
            f"EPOCH={epoch} L={lambertian_mae:.4f} NL={nl_mae:.4f} "
            f"U={urban_mae:.4f} ALL={overall_mae:.4f} "
            f"| nll={train_nll:.4f} mae={train_mae:.4f} time={elapsed:.1f}s"
        )
        training_log.append({
            "epoch": epoch, "train_nll": train_nll, "train_mae": train_mae,
            "lambertian_mae": lambertian_mae, "nl_mae": nl_mae,
            "urban_mae": urban_mae, "overall_mae": overall_mae,
            **val_metrics,
        })

        # Save best based on overall val MAE
        if overall_mae < best_overall_mae:
            best_overall_mae = overall_mae
            best_epoch = epoch
            torch.save({
                "epoch": epoch,
                "model_state_dict": model.state_dict(),
                "val_metrics": val_metrics,
                "overall_mae": overall_mae,
                "lambertian_mae": lambertian_mae,
            }, output_dir / "best_model.pth")
            logger.info(f"  ★ New best Overall MAE={overall_mae:.6f}")

    # Final report
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("FINAL METRICS:")
    logger.info(f"  Best Overall val_MAE: {best_overall_mae:.6f} at epoch {best_epoch}")
    for k, v in val_metrics.items():
        if k.startswith("MAE_") and not k.endswith("_count"):
            logger.info(f"  {k}: {v:.6f}")

    results = {
        "experiment": "multimodal_laplacian",
        "config": {
            "model": "EPINetMultimodal",
            "K": args.K,
            "lr": args.lr, "batch_size": args.batch_size,
            "epochs": args.epochs, "patch_size": args.patch_size,
            "num_views": args.num_views, "loss": "laplacian_mixture_nll",
            "scheduler": "CosineAnnealingLR",
        },
        "best_overall_mae": best_overall_mae,
        "best_lambertian_mae": val_metrics.get("MAE_Lambertian", 0),
        "best_epoch": best_epoch,
        "final_metrics": {k: v for k, v in val_metrics.items() if not k.endswith("_count")},
        "epochs": training_log,
    }
    with open(output_dir / "results.json", "w") as f:
        json.dump(results, f, indent=2)

    logger.info(f"Training complete. Log: {log_path}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


--- train_script: tools/dry_run.py ---
"""
DRY-RUN: 5-Check Pipeline Verification Script.

Verifies the entire training pipeline works BEFORE any training is launched.
Uses ONLY real data from the project's UnifiedLFDataset.

Checks (in order):
  1. Data Loading       — UnifiedLFDataset loads real data
  2. Model Instantiation — EPINet4Dir instantiates with valid parameter count
  3. Forward Pass       — Output shape matches GT, values are finite
  4. Loss Computation   — L1 loss is finite and > 0
  5. Backward Pass      — Gradients exist, are non-zero, and have no NaN

Usage:
    cd /home/bigboss/code/depth_estimation_unify_theory
    python tools/dry_run.py
"""

import os
import sys
import time

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

# Add project root to path
PROJECT_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
sys.path.insert(0, PROJECT_ROOT)

from datasets.unified_lf_dataset import UnifiedLFDataset
from models.epinet_4dir import EPINet4Dir

# ── Results tracking ──
results = {}

def record(check_name, passed, detail=""):
    results[check_name] = (passed, detail)
    status = "PASS" if passed else "FAIL"
    print(f"  CHECK {check_name}: {status}")
    if detail:
        print(f"    Detail: {detail}")


def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("DRY-RUN: 5-Check Pipeline Verification")
    print(f"Working dir: {PROJECT_ROOT}")
    print(f"Device: {'cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu'}")
    print("=" * 60)

    device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # CHECK 1: Data Loading
    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    print("\n" + "-" * 60)
    print("CHECK 1 - Data Loading")
    print("-" * 60)
    try:
        t0 = time.time()
        dataset = UnifiedLFDataset(
            manifest_path=os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, "DATASET_MANIFEST.json"),
            split="train",
            target_size=(128, 128),
            max_scenes=1,
            num_views=9,
            augment=False,
        )
        assert len(dataset) > 0, f"Dataset has 0 scenes"

        sample = dataset[0]
        assert "views" in sample, "Missing key 'views'"
        assert "gt" in sample, "Missing key 'gt'"

        views = sample["views"]   # (V, C, H, W)
        gt = sample["gt"]         # (1, H, W)
        scene = sample["scene"]
        group = sample["group"]

        views_min, views_max, views_mean = views.min().item(), views.max().item(), views.mean().item()
        gt_min, gt_max, gt_mean = gt.min().item(), gt.max().item(), gt.mean().item()
        elapsed = time.time() - t0

        print(f"    Dataset scenes: {len(dataset)}")
        print(f"    Scene: {scene}  Group: {group}")
        print(f"    views shape: {tuple(views.shape)}  dtype: {views.dtype}")
        print(f"    views range: [{views_min:.4f}, {views_max:.4f}]  mean: {views_mean:.4f}")
        print(f"    gt shape:    {tuple(gt.shape)}  dtype: {gt.dtype}")
        print(f"    gt range:    [{gt_min:.4f}, {gt_max:.4f}]  mean: {gt_mean:.4f}")
        print(f"    Load time: {elapsed:.2f}s")

        record("1 - Data Loading", True, f"Loaded scene '{scene}' ({group})")
    except Exception as e:
        record("1 - Data Loading", False, str(e))
        # Cannot continue without data
        _print_final_report()
        return

    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # CHECK 2: Model Instantiation
    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    print("\n" + "-" * 60)
    print("CHECK 2 - Model Instantiation")
    print("-" * 60)
    try:
        model = EPINet4Dir()
        total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
        trainable_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)

        print(f"    Model: EPINet4Dir")
        print(f"    Total params:     {total_params:,}")
        print(f"    Trainable params: {trainable_params:,}")

        assert total_params > 0, "Model has 0 parameters"
        assert trainable_params == total_params, "Some params are frozen unexpectedly"

        model = model.to(device)
        record("2 - Model Instantiation", True, f"{total_params:,} params, all trainable")
    except Exception as e:
        record("2 - Model Instantiation", False, str(e))
        _print_final_report()
        return

    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # CHECK 3: Forward Pass
    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    print("\n" + "-" * 60)
    print("CHECK 3 - Forward Pass")
    print("-" * 60)
    try:
        model.eval()
        with torch.no_grad():
            views_dev = views.unsqueeze(0).to(device)  # (1, V, C, H, W)
            gt_dev = gt.unsqueeze(0).to(device)         # (1, 1, H, W)
            output = model(views_dev)

        out_shape = tuple(output.shape)
        gt_shape = tuple(gt_dev.shape)
        out_min = output.min().item()
        out_max = output.max().item()
        out_mean = output.mean().item()
        finite = torch.isfinite(output).all().item()

        print(f"    Input shape:  {tuple(views_dev.shape)}")
        print(f"    Output shape: {out_shape}")
        print(f"    GT shape:     {gt_shape}")
        print(f"    Output range: [{out_min:.4f}, {out_max:.4f}]  mean: {out_mean:.4f}")
        print(f"    All finite:   {finite}")

        assert out_shape == gt_shape, f"Shape mismatch: output {out_shape} != GT {gt_shape}"
        assert finite, "Output contains NaN or Inf"

        record("3 - Forward Pass", True, f"Output shape {out_shape} matches GT, values finite")
    except Exception as e:
        record("3 - Forward Pass", False, str(e))
        _print_final_report()
        return

    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # CHECK 4: Loss Computation
    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    print("\n" + "-" * 60)
    print("CHECK 4 - Loss Computation")
    print("-" * 60)
    try:
        # Need gradients for loss, re-run forward in train mode
        model.train()
        views_dev = views.unsqueeze(0).to(device)
        gt_dev = gt.unsqueeze(0).to(device)
        pred = model(views_dev)
        loss = F.l1_loss(pred, gt_dev)

        loss_val = loss.item()
        finite_loss = torch.isfinite(loss).item()

        print(f"    Loss function: L1 (F.l1_loss)")
        print(f"    Loss value: {loss_val:.6f}")
        print(f"    Loss finite: {finite_loss}")

        assert finite_loss, "Loss is NaN or Inf"
        assert loss_val > 0, f"Loss is {loss_val}, expected > 0"

        record("4 - Loss Computation", True, f"L1 loss = {loss_val:.6f} (finite, >0)")
    except Exception as e:
        record("4 - Loss Computation", False, str(e))
        _print_final_report()
        return

    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # CHECK 5: Backward Pass
    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    print("\n" + "-" * 60)
    print("CHECK 5 - Backward Pass")
    print("-" * 60)
    try:
        loss.backward()

        # Check gradients across all parameters
        grad_norms = []
        nan_grads = False
        nonzero_grads = 0
        total_param_tensors = 0

        for name, p in model.named_parameters():
            if p.grad is not None:
                total_param_tensors += 1
                gnorm = p.grad.data.norm(2).item()
                grad_norms.append(gnorm)
                if gnorm > 0:
                    nonzero_grads += 1
                if not torch.isfinite(p.grad).all().item():
                    nan_grads = True

        max_grad = max(grad_norms) if grad_norms else 0.0
        min_grad = min(grad_norms) if grad_norms else 0.0
        mean_grad = sum(grad_norms) / len(grad_norms) if grad_norms else 0.0

        print(f"    Param tensors with grad: {nonzero_grads}/{total_param_tensors}")
        print(f"    Gradient norm max:  {max_grad:.6f}")
        print(f"    Gradient norm min:  {min_grad:.6f}")
        print(f"    Gradient norm mean: {mean_grad:.6f}")
        print(f"    Any NaN gradients:  {nan_grads}")

        assert nonzero_grads > 0, "No parameters received non-zero gradients"
        assert not nan_grads, "NaN gradients detected"

        record("5 - Backward Pass", True,
               f"{nonzero_grads}/{total_param_tensors} params with grad, max_norm={max_grad:.6f}")
    except Exception as e:
        record("5 - Backward Pass", False, str(e))

    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    _print_final_report()


def _print_final_report():
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("=== DRY-RUN REPORT ===")
    passed_count = 0
    failed_count = 0
    for check_name in ["1 - Data Loading", "2 - Model Instantiation", "3 - Forward Pass",
                        "4 - Loss Computation", "5 - Backward Pass"]:
        if check_name in results:
            passed, detail = results[check_name]
            status = "PASS" if passed else "FAIL"
            if passed:
                passed_count += 1
            else:
                failed_count += 1
            print(f"CHECK {check_name}: {status}")
        else:
            failed_count += 1
            print(f"CHECK {check_name}: SKIP (previous check failed)")

    overall = "PASS" if failed_count == 0 else f"FAIL ({failed_count} checks failed)"
    print(f"OVERALL: {overall}")
    print("=== END DRY-RUN ===")
    print("=" * 60)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
